subject: CIR.NO.286- Growing with inspirational Indian stories
body:
[image: logo1.jpg]
*SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/286
    Date: 23rd December 2025*

Dear Parents



Sai Ram!

In an age dominated by screens and instant information, it is essential to
consciously cultivate the habit of reading among our children. We earnestly
request you to encourage your child to read books and stories that reflect
the rich cultural heritage of India? stories that speak of our glorious
past, the courage and sacrifices of our valiant ancestors, freedom
fighters, the wisdom of our epics and the timeless values that have shaped
our civilisation.

Reading such literature is not merely an academic exercise; it is a
powerful source of real-life lessons. Stories of valour, resilience,
compassion and righteousness help children develop moral strength, clarity
of thought and a strong sense of identity. Narratives drawn from Indian
epics (Ramayana, Mahabharata etc.), folklore (Panchatantra), biographies of
national heroes (Maharana Pratap, Rani Lakshmi Bai, Bhagat Singh, Subhash
Chandra Bose etc.) and historical accounts enable children to connect with
their roots,  take pride in their cultural legacy and offer them a deeper
understanding of life beyond textbooks.

We also encourage parents to foster a spiritual connection at home through
simple practices such as reading or reciting the *Hanuman Chalisa* and *Durga
Chalisa*, along with explaining their meaning in an age-appropriate manner.
This nurtures inner strength, faith and emotional balance.

Making bedtime stories a daily routine can be especially impactful. A few
minutes of meaningful reading before sleep not only enhances imagination
and language skills but also creates a warm parent-child bond and instils
lifelong reading habits.

Parents and teachers are equal partners in shaping young minds. Let us
together bring our children closer to the world of books that enrich their
minds, hearts and souls.



Looking forward to your cooperation.





With Best Regards








Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email ? *principal@sathyasaiindore.com <principal@sathyasaiindore.com>*

Website ? *www.sathyasaiindore.com <http://www.sathyasaiindore.com/>*
